ItacAcademyItem.Name: Laboriosi (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Swarm of bees entering a cylindrical hive by two small apertures
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Maylender mentions a couple of publications, not in British Library Catalogue, related to this Academy: Giovanni Dolce, Paralello delle Republiche e delle Academie... G. Dolce fra Laboriosi l`Affanato, nell`aprirsi dell`accademia in casa del sig. Raimondo (Venezia, Antonio Pinelli, 1629); Corona pel dottorato di Gio. Battista Millani (Venezia, 1628).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
